msg: Phase 1: github audit + INDEX.md rollout 3 repos
Phase 2: dashboard live + heartbeat cron + repo rename
Phase 3: cloud migration + writeback cron + meta tasks
Edward switched cloud target Fly.io -> GitHub Actions chained
Edward reframed Discord cadence: silent default, dashboard pull-only

Chat archive angle 2 (decision quotes): 62 quotes scanned 135K msgs, 6 counter-examples. KEY FINDING: Axiom 1 derivative-thinking is absent from chat (only 2 hits / 135K msgs) - lives in code not speech

Chat archive angle 3 (micro-decisions): 30 existing entries verified (10 strong, 7 partial, 12 need semantic parser). 10 NEW patterns discovered. KEY FINDING: recursive engine pattern is Edward native speech since 2018 not new adoption
Edward cancelled Fly.io migration -> use GitHub Actions chained workflow_dispatch instead
Edward reframed reporting: silent Discord, all progress -> dashboard pull-model with white-language interactive viz
idle_task_picker meta-infra: daemon now self-dispatches highest-EV backlog task each cycle. 16 tests pass. Eliminates idle-wait failure mode.
New principle: minimize Edward actions. Chairman = sign-off only, COO = operational. 5-dim framework adds operational simplicity.
Phase 4: building auto sign-off batch system + dashboard upgrade in parallel
Fly.io取消下屬完成: 刪掉Fly artifacts + 建好GH Actions chained recursive workflow + daemon --once flag. Chain provably alive (5 consecutive runs)
Cloud daemon無法用Max subscription. GH runner只能用Anthropic API需要credits, Edward credit balance=0. Chain workflow跑得動但每個cycle no-op (API call fail)
Phase 3 reframe: 不遷雲LLM brain (auth卡本地), cloud只跑utility scripts (heartbeat/writeback/dashboard build). 本地daemon是forever.
